message:
bd-xox.8: Log level policy compliance tests

Add 25 unit tests enforcing log level policy compliance:
- Level categorization: INFO for state transitions, DEBUG for diagnostics,
  WARN for recoverable errors, ERROR for critical issues, TRACE for flow
- Structured field enforcement: all DEBUG+ events must have structured fields
- TRACE events require component/operation context (2+ fields)
- ERROR events must be actionable with structured context
- WARN events must include error/reason fields
- Redaction policy: no file paths, memory addresses, or env vars in events
- Field naming: snake_case, duration _us/_ms suffixes, clear booleans
- Event-in-span parent inheritance verification
- Monotonic counter namespace convention
- Level escalation boundaries (recoverable→WARN, diagnostics→DEBUG)
- Message clarity (descriptive, no TODO/FIXME markers)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
